interactions.message: Withhold Metformin 48h before and after iodinated contrast — lactic acidosis risk
interactions.action: Hold medication; reschedule contrast with 48h gap

interactions.message: Hyperkalaemia risk — Spironolactone + ACE inhibitor combination
interactions.action: Monitor K+ closely; consider dose adjustment

interactions.message: Spironolactone is teratogenic — contraindicated in pregnancy or fertility pathway
interactions.action: Discontinue immediately; switch to alternative anti-androgen

interactions.message: Enzyme induction reduces OCP efficacy — pregnancy risk
interactions.action: Add barrier contraception; consider higher-dose OCP

interactions.message: Anticonvulsant enzyme induction reduces OCP efficacy
interactions.action: Recommend barrier backup; review OCP dose

interactions.message: OHSS worsens bleeding risk with anticoagulant co-prescription
interactions.action: Monitor closely; adjust anticoagulant dose if OHSS develops

interactions.message: Competitive oestrogen receptor binding — concurrent use generally avoided
interactions.action: Review necessity; avoid concurrent use where possible

interactions.message: Heavy alcohol + Metformin — lactic acidosis risk
interactions.action: Counsel patient on alcohol limits; document in record

interactions.message: Additive insulin-sensitising effect — monitor for hypoglycaemia
interactions.action: Monitor blood glucose; may allow Metformin dose reduction

interactions.message: OCP may reduce Vit D absorption
interactions.action: Note in diet plan; recommend Vit D supplementation
Take Levothyroxine 4h apart from calcium supplements
Take Levothyroxine at least 2h apart from iron supplements
